title: ITMS
texts: VAGUS is a brand of quality products with value proposition for digital printing and graphics industry. VAGUS products are manufactured at finest manufacturers on researched specifications and with stringent quality control. VAGUS offers wide range of printable substrates for use in-shop branding and graphics, and is a first choice of many print houses for all their requirements
ITMS (Infinity Trade & Marketing Solutions) Has started operations in 2010 with head office in Delhi and currently has a pan India presence through its own branches and appointed dealers.
ITMS India Pvt. Ltd., ITMS Powertech Pvt. Ltd.,
1002, 10th Floor, Block-C, NDM-2, Netaji Subhash Place, Wazirpur District Centre, Delhi-110034, INDIA
